CVE-2021-39361.title: In GNOME evolution-rss through 0.3.96, network-soup.c does not en ...
CVE-2021-39361.description: In GNOME evolution-rss through 0.3.96, network-soup.c does not enable TLS certificate verification on the SoupSessionSync objects it creates, leaving users vulnerable to network MITM attacks. NOTE: this is similar to CVE-2016-20011.
